bonuses4.name: Jadeware
bonuses4.description: Casting Martial Art Skill activates Jadeware effect: Increases Affinity DMG by 10% and increases Direct Affinity Rate by 7.5% against targets in Qi Imbalance or with a Qi percentage lower than yours or below 40%. This effect lasts 10s and can only trigger once every 12s.

bonuses4.name: Formbend
bonuses4.description: Your shield duration is extended by 2 seconds. If you have more than 85% Qi or a Qi damage immunity shield, reduce all HP damage taken by 20%.

bonuses4.name: Hawkwing
bonuses4.description: When any of your damage triggers Affinity, gain Hawkwing: Increases Physical Attack by 2% for 5 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.

bonuses4.name: Eaglerise
bonuses4.description: Dealing damage over time or healing grants 1 stack of Eaglerise: Reduces damage taken by 1.2% for 10 seconds, stacking up to 5 times. At max stacks, receives an Eagle Guard effect that reduces the next incoming damage within 10 seconds by 90% (halved when the damage comes from a boss). This effect can only trigger once every 30 seconds.

bonuses4.name: Rainwhisper
bonuses4.description: Increases all Critical DMG and healing by 10%, and further increases them by 15% when you have an HP shield applied by yourself.

bonuses4.name: Moonflare
bonuses4.description: When attacking while defending, there is a 30% chance to create a shield that absorbs up to 10% of Max HP, lasting 20 seconds. If a shield already exists, restores 2% HP in addition. This effect can only trigger once every 60 seconds.

bonuses4.name: Swift Gale
bonuses4.description: Increases Airborne Heavy Attack by 10% and knocks the target. The Knocked-Down effect can only trigger once every 10 seconds.

bonuses4.name: Agile Steps
bonuses4.description: Upon a successful deflection, reduces all damage taken within 2 seconds by 20%, stacking up to 3 times.

bonuses4.name: Swaying Heights
bonuses4.description: Increases the damage dealt against targets with more than 50% HP by 5%. Every 5% more HP further increases this bonus by 1%, up to 10%.

bonuses4.name: Flawless Defense
bonuses4.description: Reduces damage taken by 5%. When HP falls below 60%, further reduces damage taken by 1% for every 10% HP lost, stacking up to 5 times.

bonuses4.name: Swallowcall
bonuses4.description: Light Attacks and effects triggered by Light Attacks (e.g., rodents) deal 12% more HP damage, and deal 6% more Physical and Bamboocut damage to targets with below 40% Qi or suffering from a Qi Anomaly status (including Bone Corrosion and Qi Imbalance).

bonuses4.name: Calmwaters
bonuses4.description: Performing a Perfect Dodge has a 50% chance to restore 10 Endurance and 1% HP, with an additional 2% HP restored each time when your HP is below 50% and 20% (up to a maximum of 5% HP).

bonuses4.name: Mistwillow
bonuses4.description:
Landing a Heavy Attack/Heavy Attack Pursuit Skill increases the Physical and Silkbind damage of Light Attacks and Projectile Skills by 10% for 15 seconds, and vice versa. When both damage bonuses exist at the same time, they will be upgraded to Veil of the Willow: increases the Physical and Silkbind damage of both Light Attack/Projectile Skills and Heavy Attack/Heavy Attack Pursuit Skills. Hitting the enemy with corresponding skills again can refresh the effect's duration.
The duration of the effects above can only be refreshed once every 2 seconds.

bonuses4.name: Beyond the Chill
bonuses4.description: After entering combat, if no damage is taken for 10 seconds, gain Beyond the Chill: Reduces the next damage taken and all damage taken within 2 seconds afterward by 40%. Beyond the Chill is removed upon leaving combat.

bonuses4.name: Ivorybloom
bonuses4.description: At Max HP, there is a bonus 5% chance to deal Critical healing and damage, and increases the effects of Critical healing and damage by 15%.

bonuses4.name: Whirlsnow
bonuses4.description: When you lose more than 40% of Max HP in a single instance of damage or when your HP falls below 20%, the next healing you receive within 5 seconds restores an additional 25% of your Max HP. This effect triggers once every 60 seconds.

bonuses4.name: Stars Align
bonuses4.description: When hitting at least 2 enemies simultaneously, or hitting a boss or player, you gain 1 stack of Stars Align: For 5 seconds, Martial Art Skills deal 3% increased damage and further bonus damage to enemies more than 4 meters away; the bonus increases with distance, up to 1% at 8 meters. Stars Align stacks up to 5 times, and 1 stack is removed each time you take damage. Up to 2 stacks of Stars Align can be gained per second.

bonuses4.name: Jade Embrace
bonuses4.description: When moving more than 6 meters within 1 second, gain the Jade Embrace effect: Reduces HP and Qi damage taken by 15% for 5 seconds. This effect can only trigger once every 20 seconds.

bonuses4.name: Shattered Ridge
bonuses4.description:
Hitting a boss or player grants Shattered Ridge for 5 seconds: Increases HP damage dealt by 1%, stacking up to 5 times. At 5 stacks, increases damage of Light/Heavy Attack Varied Combo, Assist Trigger Skill, and assist effects by a further 8%. A successful Deflect immediately grants 5 stacks of Shattered Ridge.
The extra DMG Boost applies to the following skills: Light/Heavy Attack Varied Combo of Snowparting Blade, Thundercry Blade, and Vernal Umbrella; Inkwell Fan - Moon Shatter Spring; Anxi Army Assist and its Trigger Skills of Snowparting Blade and Phalanxbane Blade.

bonuses4.name: Obsidian Armor
bonuses4.description: Tenacity reduces HP damage taken by 5%. Taking a hit under Tenacity grants Obsidian Armor for 5 seconds: Reduces the chance to receive Critical DMG by 2% and Affinity DMG by 1%, stacking up to 5 times.

bonuses4.name: Etherwrath
bonuses4.description:
Hitting a boss or player grants Etherwrath: Increases all types of Attack by 1% (including Physical Attack and all Attribute Attacks) for 8s, stacking up to 5 times. At 5 stacks of Etherwrath, grants 4 additional Attribute Attack Penetration for all types when Martial Trigger Effects deal damage. Triggering a Perfect Dodge instantly grants 5 stacks of Etherwrath.
Applicable Martial Trigger Effects: Heavenwill Gauntlets' Falcon's Pursuit and Vile Condemned series, Mortal Rope Dart's Rodent, Everspring Umbrella's Resonance, Phalanxbane Blade's Anxi Army Assist.

bonuses4.name: Exalted Righteousness
bonuses4.description: Triggering a perfect dodge grants Honorbound for 5 seconds: Reduces HP Damage taken by 10%, and further reduces Critical DMG and Affinity DMG taken by 12%. Honorbound can only be gained once every 10 seconds.
